title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Greaves Cotton - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Greaves Cotton - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Greaves Cotton in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Greaves Cotton:
Greaves Cotton is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
